stream_required: B.Tech (CSE, IT) Eligibility Criteria CGPA 7.5 throughout. Students should not have any standing backlogs.
eligibility: CGPA 7.5 throughout. Students should not have any
date_of_joining: April 2025 (students will be allowed to attempt online examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 1 year Internship : 25 K per month Salary after 1 year Internship : CTC 11 Lacs (8 LPA Fixed + 1.5 Lacs (As Retention Bonus, in Oct, 2027) + 1.5 Lacs (As Retention Bonus, in Oct, 2028)
package_salary.bond: 18 months service bond (with INR 4,00,000/- penalty if the bond is violated)
